headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Ignore
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

raw.headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Ignore

headline: Is Procter & Gamble Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While Procter & Gamble has notably underperformed the S&P 500 recently, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
